description.value: All creatures in 15-foot cube originating from you take [[/damage 12 type=thunder]] damage and make Fortitude saves. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. Those you beat are pushed 10 feet away from you. Unsecured objects are also pushed.

system.effect: All creatures in 15-foot cube originating from you take 12 thunder damage and make Fortitude saves. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. Those you beat are pushed 10 feet away from you. Unsecured objects are also pushed.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = fails, 1 = 1/2 damage (6), 2= full damage (12), pushed 10 feet, 3 = enhanced damage (20), pushed 10 feet + prone
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
